title: BEM-710 mailbox e2e
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tests/autonomy','governance/tests/autonomy/output']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 05:28 (UTC+3)'
# Isolated fixture test: validates parser/decision and required output contract without writing production handoff.
fixture=Path('governance/tests/autonomy/bem710_synthetic_claude_response.md')
fixture.write_text('# BEM-710 | SYNTHETIC CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'BEM-703 | CLAUDE REVIEW | MULTI-AGENT STRATEGY v2.1'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'Accepted architecture: hierarchical contours + control-plane + product repos.'+sep+'Required changes: none'+sep+'Production blockers: task scheduler proof still required'+sep)
text=fixture.read_text(errors='ignore')
upper=text.upper()
decision='MESSAGE'
if 'APPROVED' in upper:
    decision='APPROVED'
if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in upper:
    decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
if 'BLOCKED' in upper:
    decision='BLOCKED'
out_dir=Path('governance/tests/autonomy/output')
handoff=out_dir/'bem710_expected_handoff.md'
pending=out_dir/'bem710_expected_pending.md'
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE MAILBOX RESPONSE READY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Файл: '+str(fixture)+sep+'Decision detected: '+decision+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Process from repo artifact.'+sep)
pending.write_text('# Claude mailbox autoprocess pending fixture'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Файл: '+str(fixture)+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep)
checks=[
 {'name':'fixture_exists','pass':fixture.exists(),'evidence':str(fixture)},
 {'name':'decision_detected','pass':decision=='APPROVED','evidence':decision},
 {'name':'handoff_created','pass':handoff.exists(),'evidence':str(handoff)},
 {'name':'pending_created','pass':pending.exists(),'evidence':str(pending)},
 {'name':'operator_relay_forbidden','pass':'Operator relay forbidden' in handoff.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(handoff)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='fixture_e2e_pass' if not failed else 'fixture_e2e_failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'MAILBOX_FIXTURE_E2E_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'mailbox_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.v1','bem':'BEM-710','status':status,'decision':decision,'checks':checks,'production_handoff_written':False,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem710_mailbox_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem710_mailbox_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-710 | Mailbox Autoprocess Fixture E2E | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Production handoff written: false'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem710_mailbox_autoprocess_fixture_e2e','status':status,'decision':decision,'production_handoff_written':False,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem710_mailbox_autoprocess_fixture_e2e.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-710 '+status+' decision='+decision+' production_handoff_written=false\n')
changed_files.extend([str(fixture),str(handoff),str(pending),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Ran isolated mailbox autoprocess fixture E2E: detected APPROVED and produced expected handoff/pending artifacts without touching production handoff')
"""
No issue comments.
